module.name: function-listeners
module.description: Reusable listener-map builders for traversing standard function-like AST node variants across multiple rules.

scenarios.name: should register the same listener for arrow functions, function declarations, and function expressions
scenarios.then: returns a rule-listener map with entries for ArrowFunctionExpression, FunctionDeclaration, and FunctionExpression

scenarios.name: should register matching enter and exit listeners for all standard function-like nodes
scenarios.then: returns a rule-listener map with enter and :exit entries for arrow functions, function declarations, and function expressions
